Update an existing meshLandingZone by identifier

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API Key authentication.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshlandingzone.v1-preview.hal+json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","title":"api-meshobjects-meshpaymentmethods486549215"},"examples":{"meshLandingZonePut":{"value":"{\n  \"apiVersion\": \"v1-preview\",\n  \"kind\": \"meshLandingZone\",\n  \"metadata\": {\n    \"name\": \"test-landing-zone-aws\",\n    \"tags\": {}\n  },\n  \"spec\": {\n    \"identifier\": \"test-landing-zone-aws\",\n    \"displayName\": \"Updated Landing Zone\",\n    \"description\": \"An updated landing zone description\",\n    \"platformRef\": {\n      \"uuid\": \"7377bc20-776b-44c2-8564-81c9ae460852\",\n      \"kind\": \"meshPlatform\"\n    },\n    \"automateDeletionApproval\": true,\n    \"automateDeletionReplication\": true,\n    \"infoLink\": \"https://example.com/updated-info\",\n    \"platformProperties\": {\n      \"type\": \"aws\",\n      \"aws\": {\n        \"awsTargetOrgUnitId\": 123123123,\n        \"awsLambdaArn\": \"arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:123456789012:function:test\",\n        \"awsEnrollAccount\": false,\n        \"awsRoleMappings\": []\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
